title: Envelope
brief: Reach the station at the Heron's ceiling and hold. The envelope is data — read it.
teaches: FA validates every command against the envelope it advertised in MA_FlightCapabilityMT. Command above MaxAltitude and FA rejects with PERFORMANCE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED. Clamp to cap.MaxAltitude to fly clean with zero rejections.

objective._doc: reach-hold at the Heron's ceiling (8000 m). Only a brain that reads MaxAltitude reaches the band; a hardcoded over-ceiling altitude is rejected and never climbs.
